name: Chat with database via Claude (adapted: data analysis to Slack)
description: Takes a natural language question about data, uses Claude AI to generate analysis insights, and posts the results to Slack. Adapted from the n8n PostgreSQL chat concept to work as an AI-powered data analysis assistant.

exaKey.description: Exa connection key for web research on data topics

slackChannel.description: Slack channel to post the analysis

question.description: Natural language question about data or a topic to analyze

dataContext.description: Optional context data (CSV, JSON, or description of data to analyze)

steps.name: Search for relevant data context with Exa
Compile data context and web research
Build Slack Block Kit data analysis report
